name: guides/mcp-backend.md
applicability: Pattern for wrapping MCP servers as CLI backends using mcp.ClientSession + stdio_client. Directly applicable if JASON-OS wraps MCP-based services. You already have 3 MCP servers (memory, sonarcloud, context7).

name: guides/skill-generation.md
applicability: Auto-generates SKILL.md from Click CLI introspection via Jinja2 templates. Pattern for automating skill creation. Contrasts with your hand-written approach. Could inform /skill-creator automation.

name: guides/session-locking.md
applicability: _locked_save_json pattern: open r+ (no truncation), flock exclusive, truncate+write inside lock. Solves concurrent write corruption. Your JSONL files (reviews, debt, hooks) could benefit from similar locking.

name: guides/filter-translation.md
applicability: Video filter parameter translation. Specific to media CLIs.

name: guides/timecode-precision.md
applicability: Timecode handling for video editing. Domain-specific.

name: guides/pypi-publishing.md
applicability: PyPI publishing workflow for harnesses. Pattern applicable if JASON-OS distributes packages.

name: mermaid SKILL.md (183 lines)
applicability: Lightest-weight harness: no local binary required (mermaid.ink cloud renderer). Best example of minimal CLI-Anything implementation. SKILL.md format: frontmatter + install + commands + examples.
home_connection: Reference for minimal agent-operable tool pattern.

name: drawio SKILL.md (213 lines)
applicability: Typical binary-backend pattern. draw.io is a diagramming tool — could be agent-operated for architecture diagrams in JASON-OS.

name: ollama SKILL.md (221 lines)
applicability: Local LLM inference via Ollama REST API. If JASON-OS ever integrates local models, this is the CLI pattern.

name: exa SKILL.md (101 lines)
applicability: AI-powered web search and content extraction via Exa API. Your /deep-research uses WebSearch — Exa is an alternative search backend with structured extraction.

name: cloudcompare SKILL.md (789 lines)
applicability: Longest SKILL.md. 3D point cloud processing. Not relevant to SoNash. Example of what happens when a SKILL.md grows too large.

name: browser (DOMShell MCP)
applicability: Browser automation via MCP server. Uses the MCP backend pattern from the guide. If you need agent-driven browser automation beyond Playwright, this is an alternative approach.
home_connection: Alternative to Playwright MCP for browser testing.

name: notebooklm harness
applicability: Wraps teng-lin/notebooklm-py (one of your 6 analyzed repos!). Cross-repo connection: CLI-Anything provides the agent-native interface for notebooklm-py's functionality.

name: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
applicability: Claude Code plugin format. marketplace.json + plugin source directory + slash commands. First public reference. Compare against your .claude-plugin/ structure.

name: commands/ (5 slash commands)
applicability: cli-anything.md, list.md, refine.md, test.md, validate.md. Slash command definitions for the Claude Code plugin. Reference for how to define plugin commands.
